title: Edge Inference and Hardware Acceleration
shortSummary: Study optimization paths for running models under tight power, memory, and latency constraints.
whyItMatters: Frontier software roles and robotics roles diverge most sharply at deployment. This module is for builders who want to understand the GPU, edge, and hardware acceleration side of the stack.
coreConcepts: CUDA, TensorRT, and inference acceleration patterns
Tradeoffs between accuracy, speed, and power draw
